Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's core subject is 'Advanced Innovative Information Technology,' focusing on 'Web3 innovations,' 'blockchain technologies,' and 'decentralized applications,' which are fundamental to digital infrastructure and innovation (Targets 9.1, 9.5, 9.c).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course covers 'Decentralized Finance (DeFi)' and 'Self-Sovereign Identity (SSI),' technologies designed to promote economic and social inclusion and empower individuals (Target 10.2).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course promotes knowledge sharing in 'Advanced Innovative Information Technology' for 'sustainable development,' aligning with technology cooperation and multi-stakeholder partnerships (Targets 17.6, 17.8).
